data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Adobe.com leverages a microservices architecture to efficiently manage and scale its vast digital services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes containerization with Kubernetes for orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: The site uses CDNs to ensure fast content delivery globally.
data.technical_spec: Implemented with Akamai or similar CDN providers.

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: Ensures optimal viewing experience across a wide range of devices.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries and flexible grid layouts.

data.title: Server-Side Rendering
data.description: Improves load times and SEO by rendering pages on the server.
data.technical_spec: Uses Node.js with frameworks like Next.js.

data.title: API Gateway
data.technical_spec: Amazon API Gateway or Apigee integration.
